tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase I and II

payload.description: Replace over 130-year-old railroad viaduct from E115th Street to E123rd Street (Phase 1) and E127th Street to E132nd Street (Phase 2), along Park Avenue in Harlem including foundations, structure, tracks, power, communications and signals

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Trainshed Sector I

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Trainshed Sector I
payload.description: Replacement of the trainshed roof consisting of the streets surrounding 270 Park Avenue, including East 47th Street, East 48th Street and southbound Park Avenue. Includes replacement and rehabilitation of superstructure and substructure within the upper level of the trainshed.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Phase 2 - Hall Interlocking Expansion

payload.project_name: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Phase 2 - Hall Interlocking Expansion
payload.description: Extends existing E-Yard tracks eastward via construction of a new bridge over 150th Street, replacing/modifying retaining walls, track/3rd rail modifications and SOGR. Will launch a 280-foot 2 track bridge to create two additional parallel routes within Hall Interlocking

tool_args.label: Accessibility Stations Improvements at Nine Stations - Package 1

payload.description: ADA accessibility improvements at nine LIRR stations: Amityville, Copiague, Laurelton, Lindenhurst, Locust Manor, Massapequa Park, St. Albans, Auburndale, Valley Stream. Includes 8 new elevators, 2 replaced elevators, 1 replaced escalator, pedestrian tunnels, platform replacement.

tool_args.label: LIRR Stations and ADA Improvements Package II - Babylon, Forest Hills & Hollis

payload.project_name: LIRR Stations and ADA Improvements Package II
payload.description: Replace and extend station platforms and improve/provide ADA accessibility at Babylon, Forest Hills and Hollis Stations. Includes ASIMS, elevators, boiler rooms, platform canopies, escalator replacements. Forest Hills and Hollis on hold due to congestion pricing delay.
payload.status: In Construction (Stop Work Order at Forest Hills and Hollis)

tool_args.label: Interborough Express

payload.description: Full design beginning, released RFP for preliminary engineering team to advance the project. With 2025-2029 capital plan funding, will be able to complete design for NYC's first light rail line serving more than 100,000 daily riders, connecting neighborhoods in Brooklyn and Queens.

payload.raw_value_text: Total ridership for the month of October was 7.2 million customers

tool_args.label: EAGLE teams bus fare enforcement - ridership impact

payload.claim_text: Ridership has notably, increased by about 20% on stops and routes where the EAGLE teams are present, and students at these stops are tapping with OMNY cards 24% more than last year.

tool_args.label: LIRR renewable diesel fuel pilot

payload.claim_text: LIRR launched a pilot to test the use of renewable diesel fuel in one of the yard locomotives. This fuel presents an opportunity to reduce greenhouse emissions by up to 78% compared to traditional diesel.

tool_args.label: Metro-North new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives

payload.claim_text: Metro-North unveiled the first two of the new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop. The locomotives arrived ahead of schedule and within budget. These locomotives will enhance reliability and environmental responsibility, cutting airborne emissions by over 85 percent.

tool_args.label: C&D completed $2.8 billion of work in 2024

payload.claim_text: C&D has already completed $2.8 billion of work in 2024, with many more completions planned by the end of the year.

tool_args.label: Rockaway A and S lines closure for Hammels Wye reconstruction

payload.claim_text: MTA must fully close service during construction to fully reconstruct the 65-year-old Hammels Y. C&D is committed to completing the work within 16 weeks, starting with the closure in January. Transit alternatives include free shuttle buses, steep discounts on the LIRR Far Rockaways branch, and a free shuttle train.

tool_args.label: NYCT bus weekday average paid customers October 2024

payload.raw_value_text: Bus ridership increased for the second consecutive month, with a weekday average of 1.46 million paid customers

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: LIRR Grand Central Madison ridership October 2024

payload.raw_value_text: total monthly ridership to Grand Central Madison hit another record with almost 1.72 million customers, based on load weight

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: Metro-North average weekday ridership October 2024

payload.raw_value_text: Metro-North's average weekday ridership of 230,449 is a post-pandemic record, at 79.2% of pre-COVID levels

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: Committee of the Whole Meeting - November 18, 2024

payload.description: Meeting of the Committee of the Whole at 2 Broadway, 9:00 a.m., comprising NYC Transit Authority and MTA Bus Committee, Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees, Capital Program Committee, TBTA Committee, Finance Committee, and Safety Committee

tool_args.label: Metro-North unveiled first two Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives

payload.description: Metro-North unveiled the first two of the new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop. Part of a 27-locomotive order approved by the Board in 2021, plus 6 for CTDOT. Arrived ahead of schedule and within budget.

tool_args.label: Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge 60th anniversary

payload.description: 60th anniversary of the opening of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

tool_args.label: Reconstruction of Randall's Island Ramps at RFK Bridge

payload.project_name: Reconstruction of Randall's Island Ramps at RFK Bridge
payload.description: Design-Build project including two new vehicular ramps, three replacement shared-use path ramps on Randall's Island. Improves traffic operations and pedestrian/bicycle access while addressing state of good repair needs.
payload.status: Substantially Complete (four months ahead of schedule)

tool_args.label: Structure Rehabilitation of the Cross Bay Bridge

payload.project_name: Structure Rehabilitation of the Cross Bay Bridge
payload.description: Design-Build project at Cross Bay Bridge (CBB) and Marine Parkway Bridge (MPB). At CBB: replaced pedestrian ramp with ADA-compliant Bike-Ped Ramp, resurfaced walkway, rehabilitated navigation spans, strengthened bridge, installed weigh-in-motion system. At MPB: replaced finger joints, installed prototype deck panel, weigh-in-motion system.

tool_args.label: Suspended Span Retrofit and Painting at RFK Bridge

payload.project_name: Suspended Span Retrofit and Painting at RFK Bridge
payload.description: Structural upgrades on the suspended spans including anchorage structures, main cable dehumidification, overcoat painting of the steel, installation of enforcement grade weigh-in-motion system. Improves aerodynamic performance and pedestrian/bicycle access.

tool_args.label: Structural Rehabilitation of the East River Spans at RFK Bridge

payload.project_name: Structural Rehabilitation of the East River Spans and Anchorages at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.description: Structural rehabilitation to extend the life of the East River Span of RFK Bridge. Includes steel and concrete repairs, orthotropic deck repairs, structure overcoat painting, new ADA-compliant shared use path, new dehumidification systems, roadway barrier replacement, new weigh-in-motion system.

tool_args.label: TBTA toll revenue year-to-date increase

payload.raw_value_text: Toll revenue year-to-date is up 5.5% compared to the same period last year

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: TBTA collision reduction compared to 2023

payload.raw_value_text: collisions are down more than 16% for the same period vs. 2023

tool_args.label: 14th Street complex ADA progress - mezzanine to platform elevator

payload.description: Major progress towards making the three-station 14th St 1/2/3/F/M/L complex fully ADA accessible by completing the mezzanine to platform elevator on the Uptown side of the 1/2/3, following other elevator openings this summer

tool_args.label: Metro-North fleet MDBF September 2024

payload.raw_value_text: Mean Distance Between Failures (MDBF) for the fleet was 297,411 miles in September 2024, above the goal of 200,000 miles

tool_args.label: Tower Painting and Electrical Upgrades at Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

payload.project_name: Tower Painting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
payload.description: Complete exterior painting of the almost 700 foot high VNB towers, removing original lead based paints, including steel repairs and electrical work at the tower locations.

Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation

payload.project_name: Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation
payload.description: Extend the useful life of the 56 year old lower-level deck of the VNB. Includes concrete deck repairs, complete repaving, finger joint rehabilitation, substructure steel repairs, electrical and painting work, weigh-in-motion system installation, FDNY fiber optic communications work.

tool_args.label: ADA Upgrades Package 6 - five NYCT stations

payload.description: Design-Build services for ADA upgrades at five NYCT stations: Norwood Avenue Station (J, Z), Myrtle Avenue Station (J, M, Z), Avenue I Station (F), Burnside Avenue Station (4), and Middletown Road Station (6). Includes new ADA-compliant elevators and other upgrades. Option for NYCDOT-funded pedestrian access/wayfinding improvements at Burnside Avenue.

extra_fields.contractor: MLJTC2 (MLJ Contracting Corp. and TC Electric, LLC)

tool_args.label: MNR Digital Audio Call Recording System

payload.description: Design-Build services to upgrade hardware and software for Metro-North Railroad's Private Branch Exchange (PBX) system. Will integrate a recording system to locally record audio communications at MNR's OCC, back-up OCC, and key facilities across Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven Lines.

tool_args.label: MNR Radio System Upgrades Phase 1

payload.description: Design-Build services to replace Metro-North Railroad's existing radio dispatch console system in two control centers and upgrade radio and network communications equipment at approximately 80 field locations. Connects current analog field radios to upgraded digital system.

tool_args.label: NYCT operates stations in ADA Package 6
MNR operates Digital Audio Call Recording System
MNR operates Radio System Upgrades Phase 1
